programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Another name will be added to the Mike Sexton WPT Champions Cup after the conclusion of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic Main Event, but first, a winner must be decided. Six remain from a field of 490 entrants and all will attempt to continue building a stack with their eye on the top prize of $1 Million Dollars.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Bala Patur leads the way, but former WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas is heating up and is now only behind by a small margin. In the middle of the pack sits 2 time WPT champion James Carroll who will be looking to outlast the two shorter stacks at the table while also giving himself a shot at what would be his third WPT title.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: We are down to four players at the final table of the WPT L.A. Poker Classic. WPT Champion Matas Cimbolas, who finished second in this event in 2019, is still in the hunt for the title. Also in the hunt, two-time WPT Champion James Carroll, chip leader Bala Patur, and Scott Hempel who with this final table finish will record his largest poker cash to date.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: WPT hits Hollywood, FL to host the Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown. This tournament drew a field of 2,482 entrants marking the largest field of any WPT event. The field has narrowed to the final six remaining players with first place receiving $1,260,000.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Sonny Franco has maintained the chip lead at this final table, but seasoned pro Brek Schutten is right on his heels. Also in the mix are Viet Vo, Steven Snyder, Albert Calderon, and Ken Aldridge as play gets back underway in Hollywood, Florida.

programme.title: Twitch Celebrity Cash Game - Part 2 - Rampage - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Our exclusive Twitch Celebrity Cash Game is in full swing, and the only thing more outrageous than the personalities is the pot sizes. programme.title: S1E1 Two Roads
programme.desc:
“Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today.
This episode features Olympic bronze medalist Kristian Ipsen, American rugby union star Carlin Isles — celebrated as “The Fastest Man in Rugby” — and his remarkable rise from track and field and American football to becoming a two-time Olympian in rugby sevens. You’ll also meet Allison Stokke, a record-breaking high school pole vaulter who went on to compete at UC Berkeley, and Miles Chamley-Watson, a British-American fencing champion whose career includes 13 team Pan American titles, a 2019 team world championship, a 2013 individual world championship, three Olympic appearances, and a 2016 team Olympic bronze medal.

programme.title: S1E2 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Trenten Merrill, an American Paralympic long jumper who claimed bronze at the 2020 Summer Paralympics. Also featured is Casey Patterson, a powerhouse in professional beach volleyball with numerous AVP tournament wins, a gold medal on the FIVB World Tour, and an appearance at the 2016 Rio Olympics alongside Jake Gibb. Tennis legends Bob and Mike Bryan, the most successful doubles team in history, take the spotlight with 16 Grand Slam titles, 119 ATP Tour doubles victories, 438 weeks as the world’s No. 1 team, and Olympic gold in 2012. Rounding out the episode is acclaimed gymnastics coach Liang Chow, celebrated for guiding Gabby Douglas to the 2012 Olympic all-around gold and coaching Shawn Johnson to multiple medals at the 2008 Olympics.

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.desc: When most people think of deserts, we think of punishing heat, camels and rattlesnakes. But dig a little deeper, and unbelievable stories emerge, like a bleeding tree, and a desert filled with salt.

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.desc: We have always been fascinated by what lies beneath our feet. Some cultures have feared the underworlds, while others have believed that the earth houses our ancestors.

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.desc: Many cultures believe that human life began in the forest, and for that reason, a deep connection to the plants and animals is always treasured by those who live amongst the trees.

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.desc: The Latin phrase Terra firma means “solid earth”. From ancient history, man has utilized the Terra firma beneath his feet for many reasons but most strikingly to create homes out of the solid earth.

programme.title: Grand Earth
programme.desc: Mountains provide a splendid backdrop for communities but they’re also important ecological landscapes. Approximately one-tenth of the world’s population depends on mountains for their life-support.

programme.title: The Mill
programme.desc: The Cartwrights' neighbor Tom Edwards has lived as a paraplegic since an accident involving Ben Cartwright.

programme.title: The Last Viking
programme.desc: Long-lost relative Gunnar arrives at the Ponderosa. Gunnar is the leader of criminals called The Comancheros.

programme.title: Bitter Water
programme.desc: Andy son wants to sell their land but will spoil the water rights agreement Andy and Ben made years ago.

programme.title: Preacher with a Past
programme.desc: Former outlaw John Wesley Hardin's efforts to hide his past are threatened when an old friend comes to town.

programme.title: Gunfight at Black Horse Canyon
programme.desc: Jay Squire is an ex-con seeking vengeance on Jim Hardie, who sent him to prison ten years prior.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: After Bill decrees no guns are allowed on Rio Nada's streets, a casino owner puts a hit out on him.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: While serving as Rio Nada's Marshall, Bill tries to learn the identity of a bandit leader.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: Bill is forced to kill one of the Dawsons, then must contend with the brothers who want revenge.

programme.title: The Texan
programme.desc: After Bill turns down a bribe from a landowner, the man forces a doctor to quarantine the workers.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 2 The Mission
programme.desc: While traveling through the desert, the Cartwrights encounter a distraught woman whose husband has been held captive by a reclusive tribe for years. Touched by her plight, the family decides to abandon their original plans to help her navigate the dangerous terrain and attempt a daring rescue mission

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 5 The Hopefuls
programme.desc: When a group of idealistic pioneers arrives in Virginia City, their naive belief that they can create a peaceful utopia in the harsh territory makes them targets for local con artists. The Cartwrights intervene to protect the newcomers, teaching them the difficult reality of frontier life while helping them secure their future

programme.title: Straight Shooter 1939
programme.desc: An undercover federal agent investigates the mysterious death of an elderly man suspected of involvement in a major bank robbery. Posing as a drifter to infiltrate the local community, he must outsmart a ruthless gang also hunting for the missing loot while protecting the victim's niece

programme.title: The Rifleman: S1 E 2 - Home Ranch
programme.desc: After a cattle drive goes awry, Lucas McCain and his son Mark find themselves stranded and forced to seek help from a wealthy rancher. However, they soon discover that the rancher’s hospitality masks a dangerous plan to seize surrounding land, pulling Lucas into a confrontation where he must defend his rights and protect his son

programme.title: Stories of the Century S1E20 The Wild Bunch of Wyoming
programme.desc: Railroad detective Matt Clark heads into the rugged Wyoming wilderness to track down the infamous Wild Bunch. Facing off against a highly organized gang of outlaws who know the terrain better than anyone, Clark must use all his wits to dismantle their stronghold and bring the gang to justice before they can pull off their next major heist

programme.title: China 9, Liberty 37 (1978)
programme.desc: In China 9, Liberty 37, Fabio Testi stars as a condemned gunfighter offered freedom if he kills an aging rancher (Warren Oates). But when he meets his intended victim—and falls for the rancher’s restless wife (Jenny Agutter)—the deal turns deadly. Torn between passion, loyalty, and survival, the three are swept into a violent showdown where betrayal and desire collide. With raw emotion, striking landscapes, and gritty shootouts, this revisionist Western blurs the line between love and vengeance.

programme.title: China 9 Liberty 37
programme.desc: The railroad hires a condemned killer to murder an uncooperative rancher but the assassin fails to deliver, prompting the railroad men to go after him instead.

programme.title: Man From Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who don't know their land holds lots of gold, Gene puts a stop to it.

programme.title: The Feud of the Trail
programme.desc: A man who's a dead ringer for the leader of an outlaw gang kills the gang leader, then takes his place to try to bring the gang to justice.

programme.title: Branded A Coward
programme.desc: Johnny Hume witnesses the slaughter of his family at age six. When he grows into manhood, will he be able to seek his vengeance?

programme.title: Wait, What Happened?: Eye-Opening Discoveries

programme.title: The Spark: Makeup Queen

programme.title: Eat Play Stay: Brews and Bigfoot in Portland, ME

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy: The Drake Diner Slayings
programme.desc: It's the day after Thanksgiving 1992 in Drake, Iowa, and few want to cook. Locals head to the popular Drake Diner instead. In front of a packed restaurant, an armed man shoots and kills two diner employees. Is the town as peaceful as some say?
